routingPolicy: Active docs use the single-root default in goal.policy.md. The current root owns integration/state/commits/final acceptance; subagents and consults are need-shaped advisers, and coordination roles activate only for deliberate concurrency.
currentFocus: Product-coupled reconstruction campaign is paused awaiting user goal resume; preserved M2.3 target-acquisition static-contract work remains the resume target and names Playable Reconstruction as its consumer outcome.

currentDocsTruth.release: v1.0.9 remains the latest published unsigned portable WinUI ZIP with 949 packaged Lore documents; this foundation slice publishes no release. Configured-project release/publication creation is standing-authorized but remains exact-target, evidence, artifact, and readiness gated.
currentDocsTruth.product: WinUI 3 is the primary preservation/modding GUI. The separate GPL rebuild has a deterministic Core/headless verifier and one playable procedural Godot .NET First Flight client; Electron, WPF, and the old Python GUI/CLI remain archived references.
currentDocsTruth.winUiFirstUse: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and its byte-identical Lore mirror record the verified three-state setup hierarchy, preservation of temporarily unavailable remembered folders, manual Save Lab availability, shell status/focus ownership, Level 1 headings, compact wrapped source actions, truthful launch/Admin Level preset state, and demand-loaded Media VLC behavior. Save Lab Game Options gives the official Steam Input modern-controller setup path and copied-options-only boundary. The integrated guided first-save journey starts empty, presents four explicit steps, preserves app-owned output provenance, collapses advanced overrides, and enables Explorer reveal only for the current successful write. The exact repository-built Debug/win-x64 Home gate passes unattended first-run Setup and ready-state Patch Bench focus at 1100x900 and 760x820, with owner-bound focus plus unchanged input epoch, four capture receipts, two focus receipts, a schema-3 manifest, exact 1/1 native TRX, and zero relevant processes after cleanup. The separate exact repository-built Save Lab gate passes two isolated UIA-only launches with eight normal/compact capture receipts, two workflow receipts, independent retained-byte parsing of exact 233 displayable Goodies as OLD and ControllerConfigP1=1, unchanged input epoch, and receipt-bound zero-process cleanup. The exact repository-built Media/Asset gate passes three distinct UIA-only launches over a deterministic 13-file public fixture and exact 18-file application payload, with eight normal/compact capture receipts, three workflow receipts, independent catalog/FBX/PNG reconciliation, unchanged input epoch, and receipt-bound zero-process cleanup; it invokes no external action or playback path and is not retail, format-completeness, render/playback-fidelity, packaged-Release, or visual-parity proof.
currentDocsTruth.filesystemSafety: Save/options, AppCore copied-executable patching, and generated asset/package outputs use bounded roots, guarded or staged writes, final verification, recoverable full-file backups, and explicit same-user post-finalization limits.
currentDocsTruth.patchContract: The normative contract accounts for 29 catalog rows, 20 visible options, 9 hidden companions, 17 dependency edges, and 118 conflict edges. AppCore accepts only exact pinned mutation rows and preserves atomic backup/checksum/apply/restore behavior. The normal Windowed & Mods journey keeps compatibility, two bounded player mods, source/Create/receipt/Play/Stop, and local split-screen. A full-width collapsed Lab owns five purpose groups for patch experiments, launch/control, online research, music experiments, and BEA-only diagnostics. Visible status and confirmation count only next-copy inputs; copied-options values are immutable pre-confirm snapshots. Required compatibility rows remain checked/locked, ten constrained two-column actions wrap fully at 760px, and the native smoke rejects stale default-path builds. No patch bytes or AppCore injection semantics changed.
currentDocsTruth.re: reverse-engineering/ is canonical. The integrated Ghidra closeout verifies the stable 6,411-function inventory and 459-address endpoint delta, reviews 92 unique proposed corrections, applies and exactly reads back 91 confirmed rows, rejects the erroneous 0x004dac90 manifest row, applies the separately leased 0x0050b9c0 structured prototype correction, and verifies complete pre/post stores. The recovered Cursor ledger remains incomplete, static metadata is not runtime/parity proof, and 0x004dac90 remains bounded metadata debt. The camera/movement/morph candidate is explicitly runtime-required and orders four cheaper observations before implementation. Exact stale CMonitor pairs at 0x00411630 and 0x00411aa0 are removed from active mixed mutators and guarded without retiring unrelated operations.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeObserver: The corrected two-attempt measurement lifecycle is integrated at e04cce2e and accepted non-live: focused 25/31/60 suites plus the 8/24/21/60/55 runtime-tooling aggregate pass with final process zero. It performs one hash-bound prebuild, bounded readiness, strict identity/coherence, no Q before readiness, cooperative cleanup, and no third attempt. Walker-forward pair p27 and its v2 contract are accepted and closed; no live shield measurement or shield behavior contract exists yet.
currentDocsTruth.referenceCorpora: The pinned audit records Onslaught 5352a81 as an incomplete architecture corpus and AYAResourceExtractor 53b10b0 as Stuart master plus one narrow rectangular-DDS copy-bound correction. AYA remains a Windows x86 static model/texture exporter with format, fixture, build, mutable-dependency, and component-license gaps; neither reference is Steam behavior or completeness authority.
currentDocsTruth.lore: The published ZIP still contains 949 Lore documents. The current tracked packable corpus contains 955 documents across 11 classified families, with zero unclassified and nine preserved canonical/projection divergences. README gives readers one early purpose-labeled route to lore/history navigation, the curated reading map, or technical research, while explicitly denying canon, editorial, provenance, rights, freshness, completeness, or public-safety inference from offline-pack breadth. Community-preservation prose now removes personal contact coordinates and unsupported ownership, dissolution, backing, and permission conclusions; its neutral Rights Boundary limits repository and incorporated-source licenses to the material they cover. The generated inventory emits reviewed metadata signals only and does not establish historical truth.
currentDocsTruth.rebuild: The RE-informed rebuild still has synthetic movement. Selected anonymous 0003 remains a local presentation proof only. The CMSH parser now retains raw texture/TEXR and vertex attributes; e8bf0426 adds opt-in deterministic OBJ UV/normal output using bounded inverse-transpose normal transforms while default OBJ goldens remain unchanged. This is extraction capability, not retail transform/material/animation fidelity.
currentDocsTruth.curatedSourcePackage: The curated artifact is a self-contained, plain non-Git convenience package over the already-public canonical repo, not a replacement checkout or a private/public legal cut. The accepted First Flight source candidate selected 721 files, materialized 726 files with export metadata, excluded the real game-generated save baseline, and passed standalone payload/inventory, docs, npm test, notices, and hygiene gates.

activeBlockers: The shield slice still lacks two accepted copied-runtime measurements; no shield regeneration contract or retail-derived Core shield constant exists.
Complete private-corpus extraction/export coverage has not yet executed across every observed tag, extension, dependency, unsupported family, and deterministic output.
The isolated walkerref draft failed provenance, validator-reuse, branch-model, measurement-partition, and concrete-Core-target review and is intentionally not integrated.

Use exactly two copied-runtime shield attempts; if either attempt fails, publish no behavior contract, while only a valid pair may reach the shield consumer in Core and Godot.
Document and verify the WinUI Reconstruction community surface when it truthfully discovers, configures, verifies, and launches the playable companion.
Keep the queued P1/P2 viewport/command-ownership experiment bounded to the original-game multiplayer epic and do not enable Host/Join.
